chat.askPlaceholder: Ask about CPF, HDB, healthcare, benefits, or local services...
chat.unsupportedFiles: Only PDF, JPG, PNG, and WEBP files are supported.
chat.failedAttach: Failed to attach file. Please try again.
chat.translationDisclaimer: Responses can be translated to Malay, Mandarin, or Tamil.

home.welcomeSubtitle: Your personal guide to Singapore government services — CPF, HDB, healthcare, benefits, and more. All in one place, available 24/7.
home.prototypeMode: Prototype mode: Simulates a consent-based Singpass/Myinfo login
home.demoGreeting: Hello! I'm your Tampines community assistant. What government service can I help you with today?
home.demoQuestion: How do I check my CPF balance?
home.demoAnswer: You can check your CPF balance by logging in to my.cpf.gov.sg with your Singpass. Want me to guide you step by step?

features.allServicesDesc: Connects to 15+ official government portals — no more switching tabs.
features.personalisedAssistanceDesc: Get help with CPF, HDB, healthcare, benefits, and more — all from a single conversation tailored to your needs.
features.securePrivateDesc: Protected by Singpass authentication. Your data stays safe, and we never store personal information.
features.multiLanguageSupportDesc: Available in English, Malay, Mandarin, and Tamil — serving every resident in Tampines.
features.inclusiveDesignDesc: Built for seniors, low-income families, and those with limited digital literacy — simple, accessible, and kind.

process.signInDesc: Authenticate securely with your Singpass or continue as a demo resident to explore the assistant.
process.askQuestionDesc: Type or speak any question about government services in plain language — no jargon needed.
process.clearGuidanceDesc: Receive concise, accurate answers with direct links to official portals and clear next steps.
process.readyDesc: Join thousands of Tampines residents — free, fast, and always available.

residentSelect.selectPersona: Select a persona to experience how MyTampines Assistant helps real residents navigate government services.
residentSelect.profileInstruction: Each profile reflects a real Tampines resident scenario. Click a card to select, then start the demo chat.

booking.title: Find & Book Nearby
booking.locationSuccess: ✓ Location set! Facilities sorted by distance.
booking.locationError: Unable to get your location. Please type your address.
booking.addressNotFound: Address not found. Please try again.
booking.noLocationForDirections: Please set your location first to get directions.
booking.couldNotGetDirections: Could not get directions. Please try again.

1.description: General outpatient services, vaccinations, chronic disease management and health screenings.
1.requirements: Download the HealthBuddy app and log in with Singpass to make, change or cancel appointments. Website can be used to request, view, change or cancel appointments
1.cost: Consultation and treatment fees vary by service.

2.description: General outpatient services, vaccinations, chronic disease management and health screenings.
2.requirements: Download the HealthBuddy app and log in with Singpass to make, change or cancel appointments.
2.cost: Consultation and treatment fees vary by service.

3.description: Indoor badminton courts at Our Tampines Hub Community Auditorium.
3.requirements: ActiveSG account and Singpass login required. Maximum 2 slots per day.
3.cost: SC/PR: $3.50 non-peak | $7.40 peak per hour per court

4.description: Community club badminton courts available for booking.
4.requirements: Book through OnePA and log in with Singpass.

5.description: Indoor badminton courts at Tampines Changkat CC.
5.requirements: Book through OnePA and log in with Singpass.

6.description: Basketball courts at Team Sports Hall.
6.requirements: ActiveSG account and Singpass login required.

7.description: Special Features Swimming Complex with family and competition pools.

8.description: 8-lane Olympic-size lap pool and wading pool.
8.requirements: SAFRA members enter free. Guests must be signed in by a SAFRA member.

9.description: Outdoor futsal court available for community bookings.
9.requirements: Book via OnePA with Singpass login.

10.description: Full soccer field available for team bookings.
10.requirements: Book via OnePA with Singpass login.

11.description: Popular rooftop BBQ pits at Our Tampines Hub Sky Garden.
11.requirements: Book through OnePA. Singpass login required.

12.description: Resident network BBQ pit near Blk 407.
12.requirements: Only residents of the division can make bookings.

13.description: Community BBQ pit for Tampines North residents.

14.description: Sheltered BBQ pits near SAFRA Tampines sundeck.
14.requirements: Online booking only for SAFRA members. Guests require SAFRA member sign-in.

15.description: Book void decks and link buildings for weddings, funerals, social and religious events.
15.requirements: Funeral wake bookings must be made in person before setup. Some religious events require MP approval.
15.cost: Social events: $54.50/day | Funeral wakes: Free | Utilities charged separately

16.description: Book open spaces, apron areas and turf areas for social or religious functions.
16.requirements: Subject to approval by PM in-charge. Generator required for electricity usage.

17.description: Book basketball, sepak takraw and badminton courts for community events.
17.requirements: MP approval may be required depending on event type.
17.cost: Small courts: $54.50/day | Big courts: $109/day | Deposit required

18.description: Apply for mini-fair event permits at void decks or open spaces.
18.requirements: Letter from Constituency Office and MP endorsement required. $1000 deposit required.

19.description: Free bulky item disposal service for Tampines residents.
19.requirements: Limited to 3 items per month. Minimum 3 working days notice required.

20.description: Function rooms, enrichment facilities, sports amenities, gym and event spaces.
20.requirements: SAFRA membership required for most bookings.
20.cost: Prices vary depending on facility type.

21.description: Chinese calligraphy lessons covering brush techniques and writing styles.
21.requirements: Age 12 and above. Material fee payable separately.

22.description: Kids multi-sport adventure programme with obstacle activities.
